name: com.tclowe.lpc-character-creator
description: Drop-in Liberated Pixel Cup (LPC) layered characters for Unity: all 15 animations in 4 directions driven in code, runtime live equip/swap, body types, and palette recolor. GOAL: bundle the full LPC character art set with complete per-artist attribution so it works out of the box (art under CC-BY-SA 3.0 / GPL 3.0 / OGA-BY 3.0; package code is MIT). Until the bundled set ships, the selective importer (manifest + auto-slicing AssetPostprocessor) copies and slices the parts you pick from a local LPC clone and emits an attribution file.
